name: ルミナアビス：光と闇を紡ぐ少女たち

detail.description:
Download now and get 777 consecutive gacha pulls!

Choose from two options to obtain limited-edition black or white wedding dresses!

Into the abyss of light and darkness—
A story of destiny woven by beautiful girls with dual personalities.

Over 100 beautiful girls, top-class in both combat ability and beauty, will fight for you!


[Heart-pounding adventure × Beautiful girls with dual personalities]
